---
title: "Learning"
author: "Milaotou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
    css: styles.css
---
# <span style="display: none;">设置代码块全局选项</span>{.unnumbered}
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	fig.align = "center",
	fig.height = 8,
	fig.width = 10,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	tidy = TRUE
)
library(rstudioapi)
setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
getwd()
```

# 加载包
```{r libraries}

```




```{r}

```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```


```{r}
library(rstudioapi);setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$'path'));getwd()
library(tidyverse)
generate_example_data <- function(
    n = 50,
    class_levels = c("class1", "class2", "class3", "class4","class5","class6","class7","class8","class9"),
    type_levels = c("type1", "type2", "type3", "type4", "type5"),
    treatment_levels = c("tr1", "tr2", "tr3"),
    method_levels = c("method1", "method2", "method3"),
    value_range = c(0, 1)
) {
  # 生成所有可能的组合
  combinations <- expand.grid(
    Class = class_levels,
    Type = type_levels,
    Treatment = treatment_levels,
    Method = method_levels
  )
  
  # 如果指定的行数小于组合数，则随机选择n行
  if (n < nrow(combinations)) {
    combinations <- combinations[sample(nrow(combinations), n), ]
  } else if (n > nrow(combinations)) {
    warning("Requested number of rows exceeds the number of unique combinations. Returning all combinations.")
    n <- nrow(combinations)
  }
  
  # 为每个组合分配一个随机的MeanValue
  combinations$MeanValue <- runif(n, min = value_range[1], max = value_range[2])
  
  return(combinations)
}
# 生成示例数据
set.seed(123)  # 设置随机种子，确保结果可复现
df <- generate_example_data(n = 600)
baselines <- df |>
  group_by(Class, Method, Treatment, Type) |>
  summarise(MeanValue = mean(MeanValue), .groups = "drop")
baseline_ranges <- baselines |>
  group_by(Class, Treatment, Type) |>
  summarise(
    Lower       = min(MeanValue),
    LowerMethod = paste(Method[MeanValue == Lower], collapse = ", "),
    Upper       = max(MeanValue),
    UpperMethod = paste(Method[MeanValue == Upper], collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(Range = Upper - Lower)
# 绘图
p1 <- ggplot(baseline_ranges, aes(y = fct_rev(Class))) +
  geom_linerange(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper, colour = Type),
    linewidth = 1.5, alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = baselines,
    aes(x = MeanValue, shape = Method, fill = Method),
    size = 1, colour = "white"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1.0),
    labels = c(0, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 1)
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "circle filled",
      "diamond filled",
      "square filled"
    ),
    name = "Method"
  ) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(
    x = "Mean value (higher is better)",
    fill = "Method",
    colour = "Type"
  ) +
  facet_grid(Treatment~Type,, scales = "free_x", space = "free") 
p1
# 翻转xy，调整线宽，点大小等
  # 事实上是两个类似的图
p2 <- ggplot(baseline_ranges, aes(y = fct_rev(Class))) +
  geom_linerange(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper, colour = Type),
    linewidth = 4, alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = baselines,
    aes(x = MeanValue, shape = Method, fill = Method),
    size = 2, colour = "white",
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75), expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "circle filled",
      "diamond filled",
      "square filled"
    ),
    name = "Baseline method"
  ) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1", guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2", name = "Baseline method") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_grid(Type ~ Treatment, scales = "free_x", space = "free") +
  labs(x = "Meanvalue") +
  guides(
    shape = guide_legend(title.position = "top", nrow = 1)
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom", 
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "gray95"),
    text = element_text(family = "serif")  # 全局字体设置
  )
p2
# ggsave(p2, filename = "baseline.pdf",height = 8,width = 6)

```

# Session info
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
